title: GST/HST rebate – Ontario First Nations point-of-sale relief - Canada.ca
content:
## GST/HST rebate – Ontario First Nations point-of-sale relief
Form GST189 – Reason code 23
Reason code 23 provides a rebate of the 8% provincial part of the HST in Ontario for GST/HST-registrant suppliers who have provided Ontario First Nations point-of-sale relief to individuals registered under the Indian Act , Indian bands or band councils for purchases of qualifying off-reserve supplies of property or services.
Terminology from the Indian Act
The term "Indian" is sometimes used because it has legal meaning in the Indian Act .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
